issues.title: Enemy dealt 21 dmg (68% of 31 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 0, turn 18 (seq 77), the enemy dealt 21 damage which is 68% of the player's 31 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 24 dmg (100% of 24 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 0, turn 19 (seq 81), the enemy dealt 24 damage which is 100% of the player's 24 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 0 (crystal_golem)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 1, encounter 0 against crystal_golem (common). Accuracy was 32% with 19 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.

issues.title: HP crashed from 80 to 10 in floor 1 encounter 0
issues.description: During floor 1, encounter 0, player HP dropped from 80 (100%) to 10 (13%). Going from >70% to <20% in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (57 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
